rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RAPHAEL VINCENT TALIAFERRO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: continued to august 7, 2019. the declaration filed 6/24/19 is signed by the attorney. the exception that allows attorneys to sign and verify on behalf of their clients does not apply when the client is petitioning to be appointed as a fiduciary (CRC 7.103(c)). see LRSF 14.18 re curing this defect. filing deadline is noon on friday, july 31, 2019.
